metadata.scope: China high-speed rail pet transport rules
notes: This file focuses on pet transport restrictions and process requirements.
Rules are normalized from two public sources and may describe different service workflows.
When rules differ by source, both variants are preserved and marked in workflow_variants.

sources.publisher: The People's Government of Beijing Municipality

service_type: pet consignment/transport via station logistics service

coverage_snapshot.service_marking: trains marked with the Chinese character 'pet' indicator

not_allowed: juvenile pets (source states not in service scope)

hard_requirements: must have a secure locking mechanism
bottom must include anti-leak lining to prevent feces leakage

validity_notes: Animal Quarantine Certificate must be within travel credential validity window (wording from CCTV source).
required_for_pickup: receiver presents required credentials at destination station business office

steps: Book online via CRE (Zhongtie Express) WeChat mini-program 2-5 days in advance.
Bring valid ID, valid Animal Quarantine Certificate, and compliant railway pet container to designated HSR station CRE office.
After arrival, receiver picks up pet at destination station office with required documents.
On travel day, bring sender ID and valid travel credential-period Animal Quarantine Certificate.
Arrive at station consignment service window at least 4 hours before train departure.
Handle baggage-car pet consignment and escort formalities.

booking_and_station_flow.operational_hint: For production use, keep both variants and select by station product type or latest official operational notice.

core_blocks: pet exceeds size limits (33.1lb / 40cm shoulder height / 52cm body length)
pet category is prohibited (aggressive, dangerous, wild/exotic restricted animals)

rule_priority: time-window compliance by selected workflow variant
